failure_modes.mode: Pump failure due to excessive pressure drop
failure_modes.cause: High dP (119.305 bar) may exceed pump specifications
failure_modes.mitigation: Regularly monitor pump performance and replace if pressure drop exceeds threshold

failure_modes.cause: Temperature exceeds 120°C due to insufficient cooling
failure_modes.mitigation: Implement a robust cooling system and temperature monitoring

failure_modes.cause: Solid formation or debris in the DES solvent
failure_modes.mitigation: Incorporate inline filtration and regular maintenance checks

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Conduct pressure drop tests on the pump under varying flow rates to determine maximum operational limits
Run thermal stability tests at 120°C for 2 hours to assess cooling system effectiveness
Perform solvent filtration tests to evaluate the effectiveness of inline filters in preventing blockages
